name: RSS 订阅抓取
description: 抓取 RSS 订阅源，提取最新文章

config.script: const items = body.match(/<item>[\s\S]*?<\/item>/g) || []; return items.slice(0, 10).map(item => { const title = (item.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/) || [])[1] || ''; const link = (item.match(/<link>(.*?)<\/link>/) || [])[1] || ''; return {title, link}; })
